calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond CSR#5292. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-07-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff and cross-defendant William E. Gilg, Esq. was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Patrick M.K. Richardson, Esq. appeared with defendant and cross-complainant Darlene Johnson-Barnett, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on November 3, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, February 2, 2009.
Roe cross-defendants were dismissed today, February 2, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Mr. Richardson, but are applicable only to in the matter of Darlene Johnson-Barnett vs. William E. Gilg, case number CGC-08-474805. For a recitation of the ageement, please see the mini minutes in case #474805.
Mutual release of claims as set forth in Civil Code Section 1542 applies.

This matter is continued to July 7, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Set For Trial On Feb-02-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Continued To Nov-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
